name: non-pair-subject-error
expect: !{:origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :NullsFirstPairNotMap :message "nullsFirst requires a pair Map subject ({ :left x :right y }), got number" :actualType "number"}

name: incompatible-non-nil-types-error
expect: !{:origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SortWithCmpResultNotNumber :message "sortWith comparator must return a number, got Error" :actualType "Error"}
